allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("basic\\1Z-013B.mzf"\); Write-Output \("Type:   0x{0:X2}" -f $bytes[0]\); $name = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes,1,16\); Write-Output "Name:   $name"; $size = $bytes[0x12] + \($bytes[0x13] -shl 8\); Write-Output \("Size:   {0} / 0x{0:X}" -f $size\); $load = $bytes[0x14] + \($bytes[0x15] -shl 8\); Write-Output \("Load:   0x{0:X4}" -f $load\); $exec = $bytes[0x16] + \($bytes[0x17] -shl 8\); Write-Output \("Exec:   0x{0:X4}" -f $exec\))

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); Write-Output \("ROM size: " + $rom.Length\); for \($a = 0x02C0; $a -lt 0x0300; $a += 16\) { $hex = \($rom[$a..\($a+15\)] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output \('{0:X4}: {1}' -f $a, $hex\) })

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); for \($a = 0x0038; $a -lt 0x0070; $a += 16\) { $hex = \($rom[$a..\($a+15\)] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output \('{0:X4}: {1}' -f $a, $hex\) }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "Around 0x0760-0x07A0:"; for \($a = 0x0760; $a -lt 0x07A0; $a += 16\) { $hex = \($rom[$a..\($a+15\)] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output \('{0:X4}: {1}' -f $a, $hex\) })

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); Write-Output "0x0A30-0x0A80:"; for \($a = 0x0A30; $a -lt 0x0A80; $a += 16\) { $hex = \($rom[$a..\($a+15\)] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output \('{0:X4}: {1}' -f $a, $hex\) }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "0x09D0-0x0A00:"; for \($a = 0x09D0; $a -lt 0x0A00; $a += 16\) { $hex = \($rom[$a..\($a+15\)] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output \('{0:X4}: {1}' -f $a, $hex\) })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("basic\\1Z-013B.mzf"\); Write-Output "First 32 bytes:"; $hex = \($bytes[0..31] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output $hex; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "Bytes 0x10-0x20:"; $hex = \($bytes[0x10..0x20] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output $hex)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("basic\\1Z-013B.mzf"\); Write-Output "Data bytes 0-31 \(file offset 128-159\):"; $hex = \($bytes[128..159] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output $hex)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("basic\\1Z-013B.mzf"\); $execInData = 0x7D79 - 0x1200; $fileOff = 128 + $execInData; Write-Output \("Exec $7D79 at file offset 0x" + \('{0:X}' -f $fileOff\) + " \(data offset 0x" + \('{0:X}' -f $execInData\) + "\)"\); $hex = \($bytes[$fileOff..\($fileOff+63\)] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output $hex)

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); $found = @\(\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt $rom.Length - 2; $i++\) { if \($rom[$i] -eq 0xCD\) { $t = $rom[$i+1] + \($rom[$i+2] -shl 8\); if \($t -eq 0x0760 -or $t -eq 0x0762\) { $found += \('CALL {0:X4} at {1:X4}' -f $t, $i\) } } }; $found | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("basic\\1Z-013B.mzf"\); $srcOff = 128 + 0x0762; $hex = \($bytes[$srcOff..\($srcOff+31\)] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output \("BASIC bytes at source $1200+$0762 \(file offset 0x" + \('{0:X}' -f $srcOff\) + "\):"\); Write-Output $hex)

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); $found = @\(\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt $rom.Length - 2; $i++\) { if \($rom[$i] -eq 0x32 -and $rom[$i+1] -eq 0x02 -and $rom[$i+2] -eq 0xE0\) { $found += \('LD \($E002\),A at ${0:X4} ; prev={1:X2}' -f $i, $rom[$i-1]\) } }; $found | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); $found = @\(\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt $rom.Length - 2; $i++\) { if \($rom[$i] -eq 0x32 -and \($rom[$i+2] -eq 0xE0\)\) { $found += \('LD \($E0{2:X2}\),A at {0:X4}' -f $i, 0, $rom[$i+1]\) } }; Write-Output "Direct writes LD \(E0xx\),A:"; $found | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); foreach \($addr in 0x070E, 0x0712, 0x0A04, 0x0A0F, 0x0A1D, 0x0A25\) { $prev = $rom[$addr-2]; $imm = $rom[$addr-1]; Write-Output \('${0:X4}: prev_op=${1:X2} immediate=${2:X2} \(0x${3:X2} => bit={4} {5}\)' -f $addr, $prev, $imm, $imm, \(\($imm -shr 1\) -band 7\), $\(if \(\($imm -band 1\) -ne 0\) {"SET"} else {"RES"}\)\) })

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); $found = @\(\); for \($i = 1; $i -lt $rom.Length - 2; $i++\) { if \($rom[$i] -eq 0x32 -and $rom[$i+1] -eq 0x03 -and $rom[$i+2] -eq 0xE0 -and $rom[$i-1] -eq 0x3E -and $rom[$i-2] -ge 0 -and $rom[$i-2] -le 1\) { $imm = $rom[$i-1+1]; Write-Output \('Unknown pattern at {0:X4}' -f $i\) } }; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Searching for LD A,n; LD \(E003\),A sequences:"; for \($i = 2; $i -lt $rom.Length - 2; $i++\) { if \($rom[$i] -eq 0x32 -and $rom[$i+1] -eq 0x03 -and $rom[$i+2] -eq 0xE0\) { if \($rom[$i-2] -eq 0x3E\) { $imm = $rom[$i-1]; $bit = \($imm -shr 1\) -band 7; $setres = if \(\($imm -band 1\) -ne 0\) {"SET"} else {"RES"}; Write-Output \('{0:X4}: LD A,${1:X2}; LD \(E003\),A => bit {2} {3}' -f \($i-2\), $imm, $bit, $setres\) } } })

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); $found = @\(\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt $rom.Length - 2; $i++\) { if \(\($rom[$i] -eq 0xCD -or $rom[$i] -eq 0xC3\) -and $rom[$i+1] -eq 0x00 -and $rom[$i+2] -eq 0x07\) { $op = if \($rom[$i] -eq 0xCD\) {"CALL"} else {"JP"}; $found += \('{0:X4}: {1} $0700' -f $i, $op\) } }; $found | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); Write-Output "Bytes around 0x0555:"; for \($a = 0x0540; $a -lt 0x0570; $a += 16\) { $hex = \($rom[$a..\($a+15\)] | ForEach-Object {\('{0:X2}' -f $_\)}\) -join ' '; Write-Output \('{0:X4}: {1}' -f $a, $hex\) })

PowerShell($rom = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("roms\\1z-013a.rom"\); $found = @\(\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt $rom.Length - 4; $i++\) { if \($rom[$i] -eq 0x3E -and $rom[$i+1] -eq 0x07 -and $rom[$i+2] -eq 0x32 -and $rom[$i+3] -eq 0x03 -and $rom[$i+4] -eq 0xE0\) { $found += \('${0:X4}: LD A,$07; LD \($E003\),A \(bit 3 SET\)' -f $i\) } }; $found; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Search INC A; LD \(E003\),A patterns:"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $rom.Length - 3; $i++\) { if \($rom[$i] -eq 0x3C -and $rom[$i+1] -eq 0x32 -and $rom[$i+2] -eq 0x03 -and $rom[$i+3] -eq 0xE0\) { Write-Output \('${0:X4}: INC A; LD \($E003\),A' -f $i\) } })
